message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  BorderColor #D4D0C8
}

package "IP Layer" {
  [IPv4 layer]
  [Routing table]
}

package "IPv4 Ineterface" {
  [IPv4 interface]
  [ARP]
}

actor "Upper layer"
actor "Lower layer"

database "tuple"
database "Routing table"
database "ARP"

note "IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1" as note1
note "IPdata" as note2
note "Allocate IPv4 header" as note3
note "dst=192.0.2.1" as note4
note "IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1" as note5
note "IPv4.src=198.51.100.2" as note6
note "gw=198.51.100.1" as note7
note "mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01" as note8
note "Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01" as note9

tuple -> note1 : 
note1 -> note2 : 
note2 -> note3 : 
note3 -> note4 : 
note4 -> note5 : 
note5 -> note6 : 
note6 -> note7 : 
note7 -> note8 : 
note8 -> note9 : 

note9 -> "Lower layer" : 

@enduml
